name: Usage of EC2 Instance Connect on Multiple Instances
description: Simulates an attacker pushing their SSH public key to an EC2 instance via EC2 Instance Connect, granting a 60-second SSH window without persisting any key on the instance.
prerequisites: An EC2 instance with port 22 accessible and EC2 Instance Connect agent installed (standard on Amazon Linux 2)
detection_signal: CloudTrail ec2-instance-connect:SendSSHPublicKey from an unexpected principal or source IP address
